cluster_endpoint_identifier.description: Unique identifier for the Neptune cluster endpoint, used to differentiate this endpoint within the cluster.

cluster_identifier.description: Identifier of the Neptune cluster that the endpoint will be associated with; must match an existing cluster.

endpoint_type.description: Specifies the type of the Neptune cluster endpoint, such as reader or writer.

excluded_members.description: Specifies the list of cluster members that should be excluded from the endpoint. Must be valid instance identifiers within the cluster.

static_members.description: Defines the list of Neptune DB instance identifiers that will be statically included as members of the endpoint. Must reference existing instances in the cluster.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to assign to the resource, supporting resource categorization and management.
